source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Analyses/SpatialExtremes/SpatialGEVAnalysis.cs @ fc28c0c -- X11 SELF-COMPUTED structural smoke oracle. SpatialGEVAnalysis (X4) drives a seeded DEMCzs MCMC over the hierarchical 3-site x 15-obs SpatialGEV model (intercept-only level-2 trends, ctor-default log links, no copula/errors), then turns the posterior into per-site GEV/quantile bands and a regional site-averaged frequency curve on the 25 default exceedance ordinates. site_count == 3 and curve_length == 25 are deterministic structural invariants reproduced bit-identically across C++/R/Python. Cross-validation is opt-in (cross_validation flag) and left off here for runtime. X12 tightens the per-site band scalars and the regional curve to exact oracles against the real RMC.BestFit SpatialGEVAnalysis via the emitter driver it must add.
